overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic industrial waterfront district. The journey progresses from an open pier along the water, through a covered overpass, past massive industrial storage tanks, and along sidewalks beneath towering industrial structures and holographic billboards.

events.description: passing close by two NPCs standing near the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront pier toward the industrial complex

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing close together near the railing, one wearing a colorful jacket with yellow accents

entered.detail: large industrial facility with red structural elements and metal piping
calm body of water with distant city skyline visible across
wide concrete walkway with yellow painted lines
yellow metal guardrail along the water's edge
tall cylindrical chimney with red and white color scheme

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with a large industrial complex on the left and calm waters on the right. The camera moves forward along the concrete pier, passing two NPCs standing by the yellow safety railing, with a distant city skyline visible across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under industrial overpass

events.description: entering covered area beneath industrial overpass with darker lighting
exiting covered overpass into open industrial tank farm area

agents.ego_description: walking under the shadow of the massive industrial overpass structure

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete overpass creating partial cover overhead
complex network of large industrial pipes and conduits
tall metal fence with horizontal bars enclosing industrial equipment

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered industrial corridor beneath a massive overpass. The lighting becomes darker and more contrasted as the camera moves through the sheltered walkway, passing metal security fences and complex pipe networks while the waterfront falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large storage tanks

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing pedestrian crossing
turning left to cross the street toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light then crossing the industrial street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk and beginning to cross

entered.detail: massive rusted cylindrical industrial storage tank with external staircase
elevated metal walkway bridge connecting industrial structures
standard traffic signal mounted on black pole
orange street sign with 'Bennett' text mounted on lamp post
tall cylindrical silos with blue accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide industrial intersection dominated by massive cylindrical storage tanks. The camera waits at a traffic light before crossing the street with a group of pedestrians, passing beneath elevated catwalks and industrial silos.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath towering red structure and overhead pipes

events.description: entering narrow industrial corridor with tall red tower dominating the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath industrial scaffolding and overhead pipe networks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive red cylindrical industrial tower with white structural markings
tall white concrete wall running alongside the sidewalk
network of large industrial pipes and walkways spanning overhead
contemporary black street lamp with orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a sidewalk running alongside a massive red industrial tower that dominates the right side of the frame. Overhead pipe bridges and scaffolding create a partial canopy overhead while pedestrians walk along the concrete path bordered by a retaining wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with large digital billboard and commercial structures

events.description: approaching large digital billboard and denser commercial pedestrian area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the commercial billboard area passing various pedestrians and workers

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest and hard hat walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive digital advertisement screen displaying animated content
silver metal railing with horizontal bars along the walkway edge
detailed industrial building exterior with pipes and structural elements
enclosed pedestrian walkway bridge spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a more commercial industrial area featuring a massive digital billboard and enclosed overhead walkways. The camera continues along the pedestrian path, passing a construction worker in a yellow vest while the red industrial tower recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the dense, towering architecture of a futuristic industrial district. It begins along a sunny concrete pier beside calm waters and a distant skyline, moving past pedestrians along a yellow safety railing. As the camera advances, the scene transitions into a darker, semi-covered corridor beneath a massive overpass, where the open bay is replaced by metal security fences and complex pipe networks. The view then opens into a wide intersection dominated by massive cylindrical storage tanks and elevated catwalks before turning onto a sidewalk flanked by a towering red industrial structure and overhead scaffolding. Finally, the environment shifts toward a commercial industrial zone, passing a construction worker and moving beneath enclosed walkways toward a massive digital billboard.
